induced_prompt_raw:
"Generate sentences in the structure: [noun1] [noun2] [verb1] [verb2]."  

(Alternatively, a more concise version: "Write sentences with the pattern: [noun1] [noun2] [verb1] [verb2].")  

Both prompts capture the syntactic structure (NP NP V V) while being shorter than the original list.
